_comment: AHE Lifecycle Hooks — adapted from cheddarfox/safe-agentic-workflow .claude/hooks-config.json

hooks.command: echo '=== AHE Agent Team Ready ==='; echo 'ENG agents: opencode-{spec,architect,builder,reviewer,perf,ship,migration}'; echo 'PM agents: opencode-pm-{discover,strategy,prd,execution,gtm,market-research,marketing}'; echo 'Pi (verify): pi-{security,test-coverage,quality-gate,observability,pm-prd-review,pm-strategy-check,pm-market-fit,pm-discovery-audit}'; echo 'Fan-out patterns: pre-merge, pre-build, pm-review'
hooks.description: Display available agents on session start

hooks.command: if [ -f .hermes.md ]; then echo 'Project context loaded from .hermes.md'; elif [ -f AGENTS.md ]; then echo 'Project context loaded from AGENTS.md'; fi
echo '=== Agent Delegation ==='; echo 'Rule: Pi agents NEVER edit code (edit:deny).'; echo 'Rule: OpenCode agents MAY edit code (edit:allow).'; echo 'Rule: Personas do NOT call other personas.'
hooks.description: Remind delegation rules before spawning sub-agents

hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'master' ]; then echo 'BLOCKER: Cannot push directly to '$BRANCH'. Create a feature branch first.'; exit 1; fi; if git status --porcelain | grep -q .; then echo 'BLOCKER: Uncommitted changes. Commit all changes before pushing.'; exit 1; fi
hooks.description: Block direct push to main/master and uncommitted pushes

hooks.command: echo 'REMINDER: Conventional commit format: type(scope): description. Types: feat|fix|refactor|docs|chore|test'
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(py|js|ts|go|rs)$'; then echo '=== Lint Check ==='; python3 -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo 'Python: OK' || echo 'Python: needs review'; fi
hooks.description: Quick syntax check after writing code files

hooks.command: echo "=== QUALITY GATE RESULT ==="; echo 'If verdict is BLOCK, do not proceed to ship.'; echo 'If verdict is APPROVE, proceed to opencode-ship.'
hooks.description: Check quality gate result before shipping

hooks.command: echo "=== PRD GATE RESULT ==="; echo 'If PRD is REJECTED, iterate with opencode-pm-prd before engineering handoff.'; echo 'If APPROVED, proceed to opencode-spec.'
hooks.description: Check PRD review result before engineering
